name: hexis
shortDescription: Opinionated full-workflow plugin — spec to merge.
longDescription: hexis is a heavily opinionated plugin covering the full development workflow from spec to merge. Enforces consistent development standards regardless of device, agent, or tool. Skills follow a linear flow: specify → plan → use-worktree → write-test → implement → verify → review → finish.
description: Heavily opinionated plugin covering the full development workflow — from spec to merge.
author: hw0k
